title: Overdone Saplings

body:
# Overdone Saplings

Detailed 3D sapling models that retain the original aesthetic.

![all saplings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ht3E055v/images/1b364c4cb35b1d0ff848414bacaba243b5b62b04.png)

Forked from [Overdetailed Saplings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overdetailed-saplings) and added Pale Oak sapling model.
